name: zelda2
game: Zelda II: The Adventure of Link

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: required_crystals
options.description:
How many Crystals need to be set in Palaces in order
to unlock the Great Palace

options.name: key_shuffle
options.description:
Vanilla: All dungeon keys will be found at their vanilla locations.
Shuffled In Dungeon: Keys will be shuffled amongst their original dungeon checks.
Keysanity: Keys will be able to be found anywhere.
Regardless of the option chosen, Keys will only be usable in their respective dungeon.

options.name: spell_locations
options.description:
Vanilla: Spells will be found at their normal locations.
Shuffled: Spells will be randomized amongst all of the Wise Men.
Anywhere: Spells can be found anywhere.

options.name: early_candle
options.description: Ensures that the Candle will be accessible early on.

options.name: remove_magical_key
options.description: Removes the Magical Key from the item pool. If enabled, 4 more Three-Eye Rock Palace Keys are placed.

options.name: candle_required
options.description:
If enabled, you will be logically expected to have the Candle before going inton any caves.
This does not include the Parapa cave, as the original game expects you to traverse this cave
in the dark.

options.name: cross_required
options.description:
If enabled, you will be logically expected to have the Cross before going to Old Kasuto
or Death Valley.

options.name: remove_early_boulder
options.description: Removes the boulder blocking the south part of the western continent.

options.name: better_boots
options.description: If enabled, the water near Saria Town will be changed so that it can be walked on using the Boots.

options.name: palace_respawn
options.description:
If enabled, you will respawn at the current Palace entrance if you continue,
but not if you save and reset. If disabled, this only applies to the Great Palace.

options.name: fast_great_palace
options.description: If enabled, most of the Great Palace will be skipped.

options.name: starting_lives
options.description:
How many lives you will start with upon loading the game.
This value will be permanently increased by one every time you find a
1-Up Doll.

options.name: encounter_rate
options.description: The rate at which random enemy encounters spawn.

options.name: keep_exp
options.description: If enabled, you will retain your EXP after continuing, and it will be saved to your file.

options.name: starting_life
options.description: What your starting Life level is.

options.name: starting_magic
options.description: What your starting Magic level is.

options.name: starting_attack
options.description: What your starting Attack level is.

options.name: random_tunic_color
options.description: Randomizes Link's normal and Shield tunic color.

options.name: random_palace_graphics
options.description: Randomizes the color and tiles of each Palace except the Great Palace.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
